title: Forensics Batch Window
subtitle: Nightly forensic jobs spill into daytime operations
objective: Separate bulk processing from online APIs using queued worker pipelines.

concepts.title: Async Batch Channel
concepts.description: Batch work should enter queue, not block API thread.

concepts.title: Output Persistence
concepts.description: Workers should write outputs to storage.

concepts.title: Protected API Entry
concepts.description: Client traffic should still enter via load balancer.
